title: eriolobus trilobatus
intro: Eriolobus trilobatus, also known as Chinese wingnut, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Taiwan. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eriolobus trilobatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
